name: DOD killer backstories?
description:
you pick killer, and experience backstory i dont know what else to write here okay?

skins for each killer that would work cause theyre not much different

Peesurer: classic (friendbro 🙏) and phantasm. every otger skin except mequot, iquot, hardest game and maze guy, is a maybe

🇫🇷🇫🇷🇫🇷🇫🇷: Paintful, #SoRetro, and Artistry. (also i just found out tixful is )

Hard wood: all except raigken, discernia and ena. unsure about screwy

red sphere: livedroid, MLGdroid and deathstar. im actually kinda unsure about deathstar but whateverrrrrr

forgot to remove the part of saying do not use pursuer. erm you can use pursuer yes. ok cool
